THA-7603A Helix Antenna

High-performance helix antenna for handheld, UAV, machine-control and compact GNSS integration workflows.

Get a Quote Download Catalog
OverviewApplicationsSpecificationsDownloadsInquiry

Key Features

External handheld antenna
High-precision positioning support
Compact helix design
Multi-frequency family
Buyer-focused value

Why overseas buyers choose this model

High-performance helix antenna for handheld, UAV, machine-control and compact GNSS integration workflows.

✓

Compact receiver design helps dealers offer an accessible RTK option for surveying and mapping customers.

✓

Multi-constellation tracking, Linux platform and IMU support cover mainstream field requirements.

✓

The model can be quoted with a complete kit, including controller, pole, charger, case and accessories.

Applications

Typical project scenarios

Use the application cards as a quotation starting point. TOKNAV can confirm the final kit after checking project environment and delivery requirements.

Handheld GNSS

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Machine control

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Compact integration

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Buyer Notes

Parameters may be updated by the manufacturer. For quotation, distributor cooperation or dealer projects, please send your target application, quantity, country and required accessories so TOKNAV can confirm the latest configuration.

Procurement FAQ

Common Questions Before Purchase

What is THA-7603A Helix Antenna mainly used for?

THA-7603A Helix Antenna is mainly used for Handheld GNSS, Machine control, Compact integration. Buyers can confirm the final configuration based on project application, country, correction method and accessory requirements.

Can I request the latest datasheet and price for THA-7603A Helix Antenna?

Yes. Use the quote form on this page to request the latest datasheet, price, MOQ, lead time, packing list and recommended accessories for THA-7603A Helix Antenna.

Are the parameters final for every market?

Product parameters may be updated by the manufacturer and can vary by configuration or regional version. TOKNAV should confirm the latest configuration before quotation or shipment.

Procurement support

Need help choosing a complete receiver kit?

Send your model, target quantity, market country, application and accessory preference. TOKNAV can prepare a practical quote package for distributor review or project bidding.
